title: Part 1
overview: With the Absolution under attack from an unknown enemy, TOM is force ejected by SARA in an escape pod. During the countdown to warp, TOM's pod is damaged by the enemy.

title: Part 2
overview: In a flashback TOM explains to the crew of the Cosmo how he ended up with them. The Absolution is attacked by an unknown force of space bandits.

title: Part 3
overview: The Cosmo Samurai board the Akutou mothership.

title: Part 4
overview: With their backs against a wall, the Cosmo Samurai struggle to defend themselves from the onslaught of robots.

title: Part 1
overview: The Cosmo Samurai lie dead aboard an exploding ship when the Akutou leader, Jaaku, descends upon TOM's lifeless body.

title: Part 2
overview: In a grassy field TOM is surprised to find Tsuruhime alive.
